Event Name: 3rd Fridays with Vaughn Willis and Ear Candy ft K Jayne @ LUSH Lounge
Event Description: Its the 3rd Friday of the month so that means live music with Vaughn Willis and K-Jayne! Don't wait! Get your tickets TODAY! Vaughn Willis and Ear Candy are BACK at Lush Lounge every 3rd Friday of the month and they will be featuring the beautifully talented K. Jayne on vocals! Close out the night with DJ D.R.E. from 12:00 am - 2:00 am $10 cover for General Admission Please select "Buy On Map" option to purchase and reserve your tables in advance. [Due to the layout of the venue, tables will have to be purchased as a whole (i.e. you cannot just purchase 2 seats at a table with 4 chairs). IMPORTANT: When you reserve a table in advance, you are paying for the fees associated with the cost of the table ONLY. This fee does not include food or beverages. Food and beverages are sold separately at Lush Lounge. If your table has 6 seats, your table will have 6 wristbands for entry which is included in the cost. Tables that have not been reserved in advance can be purchased at the front door when paying your entree fee. The cost of the table will depend on the seating capacity of each table. We will also use your entry fee as part of the payment towards your desired table. There will be seating for general admission at the bar and other places within the venue. $150 bottles = Ciroc, All Crown Royal, Captain Morgan, Malibu . $200 bottles = Titos, Patron, 1800, . $250 bottles = Don Julio BLANCO, Hennessey . $300 bottles = Dusse, Remy, Grand Marnier
